reviews.title: Huge Brush Head, Might Take Some Getting Used To.
reviews.text: I got these in the mail today and am mixed on them.  For one, I was instructed to do more brushing along the gum line for gum health, so these seem perfect.  I also really like that they are super soft bristles and are pretty gentle on that gum line, however, the brush head is huge and takes a little getting used to.  I have a big mouth and kind of wonder how this would work on a child or petit adult.  I was very happy with the brushing I got and I think I will be using these brushes exclusively in the coming months and will see how they went, once the coronavirus lockdown is over and dentists are back to work.

reviews.title: Very cute
reviews.text:
These were very cute!

I was pleased with these toothbrushes. I think they did a good job at getting my daughter's teeth cleaned. They felt good in her mouth. I thought they worked well.

I have been happy with this brand. We have bought dental products for a long time. They were easy to use. Teeth felt good after it. They last a while. They are a quality product. I would recommend it.

reviews.title: Will Take Getting Used To...
reviews.text: I was interested in trying out these toothbrushes, which I've had recommended to me by a couple of friends.  They're definitely weird in the beginning.  When you're used to a bit of coverage as you brush, having the thin strip down the middle and then on either side is a little odd.  I kept feeling like I had to rotate the brush more, which. might be a good thing?  It seems to clean as well as my normal toothbrush, but it is going to take time to be comfortable with.

reviews.title: Great beginner toothbrush
reviews.text: Great beginner toothbrush! The bristles are really soft so great for someone just getting started. I used one in my almost 5 yr old and the other on my almost 2 year old. Both worked great and were soft enough for them.

reviews.title: Super soft!
reviews.text: I have a niece that hates brushing, and doing so is a pain. The design of this is unique. It has a V shaped head to reach the teeth and gums at the same time. Comes in a pack of 2 so the two will last six months. Has a wider handles for little hands.

reviews.title: the Artists' (Tooth) Brush
reviews.text:
these tooth brushes are so pretty. the heads are dwarfed by the handles, but the heads are the perfect size for my mouth and the handles are the perfect size for my hands, so no complaints. been using one for the last two days, with charcoal toothpaste and tooth powder. the black bristles make it a bit harder to see when the brush is totally cleaned after brushing, but not so much that it's a problem.

the bristles are great and leave my mouth feeling squeaky clean, but I wish the heads were replaceable because the carved handles are amazing. extremely comfortable, too. I'll definitely start a collection as the bristles die, then (after sawing off the heads) sand them down and use them for something decorative. they're far too pretty to toss in the garbage.

ever since discovering bamboo fabrics a couple of years ago I've been on a bamboo kick for any and everything possible. it's long been one of my favorite plants (and the first thing I planted here at my home), and that it's sustainable/environmentally friendly has made it my go-to. hadn't even considered that there might be toothbrushes made of bamboo, but the minute I saw them I grabbed them. HIGHly recommended. bamboo is the wave of the future!

title: Oral-B CrossAction Toothbrush Heads - 16 Degree Bristles for Superior Cleaning
description:
Product Description
The Oral-B CrossAction brush head is our most advanced replacement brush and is now available as a Black Edition. With the perfectly angled CrissCross bristles, it goes deep into the interdental spaces and ensures a superior plaque removal compared to a conventional manual toothbrush. The blue indicator bristles indicate when to change the brush head. The brush head is compatible with all Oral-B electric toothbrushes except Oral-B Pulsonic. 3 Oral-B CrossAction Black Edition replacement toothbrush heads are included.
Set Contains:
3 x replacement brushes.
features: Advanced brush heads reach deep between the teeth
With the perfectly angled CrissCross bristles
The blue indicator bristles indicate when to change the brush head

reviews.title: Great for Sensitive Gums and Teeth
reviews.text:
I was told by my dentist to switch toothbrushes from manual to Oral-B electric toothbrush because it stops brushing when you brush too hard and keeps your enamel in tact, which helps relieve sensitive teeth. The dentist also recommended Oral-B because it was a good price point and has great features like a timer for 2 minutes and gets really close to the gum to get rid of icky plaque. Since I have been using Oral-B, he has noticed that I no longer have any plaque build up between cleanings and my sensitive teeth are gone. He also says my teeth look whiter and brighter. I love the toothbrush because it is light and easy to hold and get to those hard to reach places in the back of your mouth. It also leaves your teeth feeling extremely clean compared to a manual toothbrush. I can never go back to a regular toothbrush now because I tried on vacation once and felt absolutely disgusting in comparison. Oral-B is definitely the way to go for a clean mouth feel!

mouthwashes to ACT Restoring because it restores enamel that is weak and will alleviate sensitivity and use Glide Comfort Floss. Boy, was she correct. After just a few days of using the mouthwash I no longer feel that uncomfortable sensation on my teeth. I also am no longer needing prescription strength toothpaste. I now use this mouthwash twice daily and floss once a day, in combination with Sensodyne's Repair and Protect toothpaste. My gums do not bleed when I floss and I don't dread flossing. Glide floss goes easily between even the tightest teeth and has a lovely mint flavor that helps freshen breath at the same time. Changing the floss and mouthwash have made a huge improvement and now I can eat hot or cold foods without wincing in pain.

title: COSLUS Kids Sonic Rechargeable Electric Toothbrush: Interactive Smart LED Light Toddler Silicone Tooth Brush (Bluelue)
features: 🌟INTERACTIVE FUN BRUSHING: Featuring cute cartoon character design and rainbow LED lights, COSLUS electric toothbrush makes brushing more fun and easier for boys and girls ages 3+. Your children will be rewarded with a star after each successful brushing, which can motivate them to collect all the stars, fall in love with brushing teeth, and enjoy endless fun with cute characters. Studies show that 93% of parents prefer an interactive toothbrush to develop their child's healthy brushing habits

⏰BUILDS HEALTHY BRUSHING HABITS: Based on the professional advice of brushing teeth twice a day for two minutes each time, COSLUS toothbrush sets the smart timer to 2min and lightly vibrates every 30 seconds to remind child to switch to another part of the teeth, thoroughly clean their oral, and develop correct habits. Meanwhile, our toothbrush has 3 cleaning modes with memory function: deep clean, soft clean and massage, you can choose the right mode according to your child's needs

✔️GENTLE & EFFECTIVE CLEANING: Created in partnership with thousands of Professionals, COSLUS kids toothbrush is safe, effective and gentle on incoming teeth and sensitive gums. Ultra-low vibration, children will not feel numb when using. What's more, this toothbrush vibrates up to 31000 times/min, 100% more powerful than ordinary electric toothbrushes. And Come with 2 toothbrush heads: 1 soft bristle for sensitive gums, 1 standard bristle for deep cleaning

🎁Designed For Kids' Oral Development: The unique caterpillar-shaped silicone handle is comfortable and non-slip, more suitable for children's small hands. And widened tongue brush head is made of food-grade silicone to massage kids' tongue while cleaning effectively. In addition, the lock-type design can better prevent brush head from falling off, allowing kids to brush more safely independently. With IPX7 waterproof design, your children can directly rinse and soak it with water after brushing

⚡90 Days Long Endurance: This rechargeable kids electric toothbrush lasts up to 90 days after 2.5 hours of wireless charging, more convenient and faster. It highly reduces the hassle of frequent charging and battery replacement, easy to use at home and on the go. In addition, the average lifespan of our electric toothbrush is approximately 3 years, which is double the lifespan compared to other electric toothbrush

Tips: It is recommended to replace the brush head every three months. ---You can check the related information on the box, get 3 replacement brush heads --- Or buy other brush head sets at the COSLUS store to better experience this electric toothbrush

title: GUM Crayola Twistables Kids Toothbrush with Fun Twisting Head, Soft Bristles, Ages 3+ (Pack of 4) -230TT
description:
Product Description
Getting your kids excited about their daily tooth brushing routine requires more than just an ordinary kids toothbrush. Give them the fun and functional GUM Crayola Twistables Toothbrush for kids. It’s one of the best toothbrushes to keep kids engaged with bright and colorful handles, as well as a twistable head that can be extended from the toothbrush handle with a twist of the bottom green knob. When not in use, kids can twist the toothbrush back and store upside down in the included toothbrush cap. The cap doubles as a stand to keep the brush from rolling off the bathroom sink. This toothbrush also comes with soft, antibacterial bristles to further inhibit germ growth. The toothpaste sweet spot is highlighted by the colored bristles in the center of the compact head to teach children how much toothpaste they should be using. If you want to equip your little ones with a kids' toothbrush that will get them enthusiastic about their twice-daily tooth brushing routine, the GUM Crayola Twistable Toothbrush is what you need.
Manufacturer Contact Information
1-888-777-3116
features: EXTENDABLE TOOTHBRUSH HEAD: Twist the green knob on the handle to extend the compact toothbrush head for a fun and functional cleaning experience

KIDS TOOTHBRUSH CAP & STAND: Convenient antibacterial cap and stand to keep the brush from rolling off the sink. When it’s time to travel, pop the cap on top to cover the brush – perfect for road trips, camping, and sleepovers
CLINICALLY PROVEN BRISTLES: GUM Dome Trim brushes feature a raised center bristle design that provides greater contact with the tooth surface, while also reaching under the gum line
TOOTHPASTE SWEET SPOT: The compact head features colored centered soft bristles that teach children where to place their toothpaste and how much paste is needed
THE GUM MISSION: We are committed to helping people of all ages have stronger, healthier teeth, and gums by providing high quality, innovative oral care products that promote optimal dental health

reviews.title: Meh its ok
reviews.text: Its just a cheap what you would get for free at the kids dentist office kind of brush. Its totally flat but thats not a huge deal for me. The brush twisting gets my kids more into brushing their teeth but when I am brushing, the brush itself doesn't lock into place as as you are going around in their mouth and moving your hand it twists and doesn't stay in place. So I am typically adjusting at least once mid brush. Usually my kiddos are good about brushing but they have their days so its those days its really an issue for me. For the price it isn't worth it for me.

I thought they twisted all the way down but actually the head stays out then u use the stand as a cover which is what I needed since hes always knocking stuff off the bathroom sink. Will recommend to friends and family, and buy again in the future, really great product!

reviews.title: Perfect...For My Cats. :))
reviews.text: My vet advised me to brush my cats' teeth at least 3x a week. They haven't liked the typical toothbrushes used for this, so I decided to try these. They tolerate these brushes really well and even seem to enjoy the "massage" these brushes give them. I have two cats so it was great that these came in a two-pack so each gets their own toothbrush. They work well with the "cat toothpaste" I use and I haven't had any issues with the little silicone bristles coming off like the bristles on other types of toothbrushes. It slips over my finger and fits perfectly - just snug enough that I have good control, which is imperative for brushing pet teeth, and it also gives some protection in case of biting. This hasn't been an issue for me, since my cats are young and are used to having their teeth brushed at this point. The key to successful tooth brushing for cats is starting slow and being consistent. Glad to have found these, because they really do make the process a lot easier and I'm able to get the job done a lot faster and with less fuss from my fur babies. I'm also more confident that these can be kept cleaner than a typical toothbrush due to being made of silicone because the last thing you want is to spread more bacteria around! Would definitely buy these again when they wear out, but they seem durable enough that they will last for years.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text: Great value, cute packageing. Great for travel or guests.

reviews.title: Nice quality and colors
reviews.text: Bought these to pack in hygiene kits for people in crisis, so they had to be individually wrapped to keep them hygienic and clean. They came in strips of 10 with perforations in between to separate each toothbrush. unfortunately, some of the seals between the toothbrushes split open when I cut them apart. I did not "tear" them apart, I very carefully cut them apart with long scissors, but the seal just wasn't good enough to hold. Maybe 4 out of 50 weren't usable because of this, which is unfortunate as we needed all 50. The price point was so reasonable, though, that this flaw could be forgiven.

reviews.title: Thumbs up
reviews.text: Used these as gifts for goodies bags for our women’s conference.

reviews.title: Good AND bad!!
reviews.text: They work but only lasts for like 3 uses, BUT at this price I like a new brush every 3 uses snyway so thats it! If you are looking for a brush that lasts a month (yuck) this aint it but if you want a fresh brush every couple days go for it.

title: BASHUO Kids Ultrasonic Electric Toothbrush, 6 Gear Speed Mode IPX7 for Sensitive Teeth 360° Oral Cleaning U Shaped Toothbrush for Children Toddler 2-7 Years Old (Pink)
features: 【KIDS ELECTRIC TOOTHBRUSH】U-Shaped Toothbrush for Kids adopts a cute cartoon design, has 6 different tooth brushing modes, scientifically shakes for 45 seconds, and protects the dental health of children aged 2-7. The silicone head design allows children to develop the correct way of brushing without manual adjustment, making brushing a habit for children and enjoying the fun of brushing.

【Material safety and security】U shaped soft silicone brush head, medical food-grade liquid silicone material is environmentally friendly and hygienic, transparent, odorless, tough and durable, and food-grade bristles will not hurt the gums.

【45° Ultrasonic Toothbrushes】The professional scientific design of kids electric toothbrush,We have passed tens of thousands of simulated dental cleaning tests: 45° brushing with LED cold blue light low-frequency wave cleaning, 45 seconds of smart scientific timing to care for the toddler's teeth. The Technique is safe to protect oral health by redox reaction with pigment.

【MULTIFUNCTIONAL MODES】Six different smart cleaning modes，Which can satisfy that all teeth are covered, sound waves clean teeth 5000-15000 times/min, different frequencies, diverse and powerful, care for oral health, clean stubborn tooth stains, whiten teeth, also suitable for sensitive gums, and promote around the gums Gum blood circulation. It is equipped with 400mAh battery, It can be used for 400 hours each time with USB charging once every half month. Perfect for daily use and travel.

【IPX7 waterproof】With IPX7 professional waterproof technology,Toddler can brush their teeth while bathing. USAGE TIPS - This toothbrush should be used with foam toothpaste. When brushing your teeth, please move left and right while adjusting the up and down angle to achieve the best cleaning effect. Replace the brushing head every 2-3 months to Keep the brush head in good condition. Keep the toothbrush body dry while charging and its working time should be less than 10 mins.

reviews.title: Great for little boys who don’t brush well
reviews.text: My son is horrible at brushing his teeth. He does it often, just has a hard time getting every crevice. He shakes this around back and fourth while in his mouth and gets them nice and clean. 10/10 would recommend.

reviews.title: Great for classroom pencil holders!!
reviews.text: I just got these, after failed attempts with dollar store pencil holders. These are sturdy, and  can hold a marker, Expo, and 2 pencils!! I will update if they break, but they seem very sturdy!! I would recommend them to all my teaching friends. If they can stand up to second graders, they will stand up to anyone needing these for travel!

reviews.title: I bought these for my double point knitting needlseT
reviews.text:
These are as promised, they come individually wrapped and are clean and free of manufacturing grease.
I am not using them for the intended purpose but they are great for storing my sets of dp needles. I can find the size I want immediately and they don't spread themselves all over the drawer where they're kept any longer.
They seem to stay together very well, I can recommend them for this purpose with no reserve.

reviews.title: Great to use as pencil holders!
reviews.text: I am using these as pencil holders for my students. They are working great so far!

reviews.title: Hi
reviews.text: There bad ass I like this

reviews.title: Bought for classroom
reviews.text: I use these in my classroom for pencils. Unfortunately about 4 have broken at this point just from regular wear and tear. They are probably good for travel, but don’t withstand 4th grade usage.

title: grabease Double-Sided Toothbrush for Ages 6 Months to 4 Years, Soft Bristles & Choke Protection Shield, BPA-Free, 1 Pack, Yellow
features: INDEPENDENT TOOTHBRUSHING: Introducing our game-changing toothbrush designed for independent toothbrushing in babies, toddlers, and preschool kids aged 6 months to 4 years! With its two-sided design, this toothbrush encourages a positive approach to oral hygiene. The pack includes one double-sided toothbrush that's perfect for little hands, and a silicone finger brush for gentle gum massage. This toddler toothbrush is ideal for a child's first toothbrush, making dental care fun and easy.

DOUBLE-SIDED TOOTHBRUSH: Our toothbrush is designed to give your child a dazzling smile in no time! The innovative, tapered bristles on both sides of this brush offer maximum contact with teeth - perfect for easily-distracted little ones. Plus, a bonus finger toothbrush is included, ideal for infants, and kids experiencing sensory or sensitivity issues. Ensure your child's dental care starts off strong with our versatile brush set.

SOFT BRISTLES & CHOKE PROTECTION: Our patented design ensures a safe, mess-free tooth cleaning experience for both toddlers and parents. With a built-in choke barrier, the Brush prevents over-insertion and gagging. The soft, flexible bristles are gentle on tender gums and new baby teeth. This versatile toothbrush is a must-have for your baby's first dental care kit - perfect for toddlers, first-time brushers, and those transitioning from finger toothbrushes.

EXPERT APPROVED: Specially designed for infants and toddlers, our patented toothbrush has the seal of approval from top pediatric dentists. With endorsements from the American Academy of Pediatric Dentistry, you can trust that our product is perfect for your child's needs. Remember to replace every 3-4 months for optimal oral hygiene. Shop with confidence, as our brushes ensure a safe, effective start to your baby's dental journey. Order spares or stock up now!

CERTIFIED SAFE: Meticulously lab-tested to meet the most stringent USA safety standards for your baby's wellbeing. Our toothbrushes are 100% BPA, lead, and phthalate-free, ensuring your child's safety as they learn proper oral hygiene. Guide your child with our double-sided toothbrush designed specifically for their needs - from their first tooth to confident self-brushing as a toddler. Create healthy habits under your loving supervision with Grabease.

reviews.title: Not a primary toothbrush
reviews.text: It’s hard-to-impossible to clean the front of my 18 month olds teeth with this. It’s too big. I can use a different brush for that, and then give this to him to “play with” for a few minutes. He makes gagging sounds but it is safe, of course; it’s just much bigger than other baby brushes. I’d save for older toddlers and even then it might be hard for fronts of teeth.

reviews.title: Cheaply made
reviews.text: Liked it but bristles got kind of funky quickly..

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: Great baby’s first toothbrush

reviews.title: So far so good.
reviews.text: baby likes this, but i feel that it's a little bit on the shorter side. It does get the job done: cleaning teeth!

reviews.title: like, but its not love
reviews.text:
we've been using this for about a few weeks and it looks like we've had it for a year- its frayed pretty bad :(
**update- we trashed it and bought the cheaper ones. its not worth the price if its only going to last 2 weeks.

title: SHNOKER Toothbrush,Ultrasonic Automatic Toothbrush,IPX7 Waterproof,Three Clearing Modes,Cartoon Modeling Design for Kids (Blue 3-6 Year)
features: 【LOVELY CARTOON DESIGN TO ENHANCE THE FUN OF BRUSHING TEETH】 The cute cartoon design make this lovely automatic toothbrush attractive to all kids, they are excited to brush the teeth with this funny toothbrush, easy and fun for little brusher ages 3 and up. This help your kids be willing to brush teeth longer even develop healthy brushing habits.

【IPX7 WATERPROOF】IPX7 waterproof sealing design is adopted, and babies can also use it when bathing. The product can be placed in a water depth of 1 meter and soaked for 15 minutes, and the product is still in normal use without being damaged.

【FAST CHARGING】 The ultrasonic toothbrush is equipped with fast charging cable, which can be discharged and charged instantly. The LED lights on when USB charging is connected, and it only needs to be charged for 3 hours and can be used for 1 week. Safe, fast and convenient, easy to use at home or travel.

【UNIQUE U-SHAPED DESIGN】 Ergonomic U-shaped brush head, suitable for the shape and mechanics of children's teeth structure. Soft pacifier grade silicone, soft brim around the teeth 360 degrees, providing a comfortable feeling of brushing, the original V-shaped cleaning path, effective deep cleaning, will not harm the gums, protect children's enamel.

【MULTIFUNCTIONAL MODE】Our automatic toothbrush can promote the health of gums and teeth through different functional modes : 1. Strong mode for powerful teeth brushing; 2. Medium mode for comfortable teeth brushing; 3. Massage mode for gum massage.50 secs scientific timing for each brushing, it stops automatically, Parents don’t have to face to face to urge children to brush their teeth.

reviews.title: It came off
reviews.text: My daughter pull off the rubber part that it attached to the metal part. I have no idea if it was supposed to do that. She can still use it but I to help her get it out of her mouth at times. I need to see if I can have it exchanged for a new one. Its a lot easier to get her to brush her teeth she likes it and she is 4

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text: My eldest has a difficult time with the sensation of anything against his gums.  This results in nasty plaque.  I was hopeful that this would be a solution but it's not.  Expensive let down.

reviews.title: Worked great for 3 months
reviews.text: Worked great for 3 months. Then stopped working even though it was fully charged.

reviews.title: Good 4 Already Clean Kid Teeth
reviews.text:
Very easy and fun for toddlers who are learning to brush their teeth. Definitely must swish back and forth, for any actual cleaning to take place.

Wouldn't recommend for children with chronic oral hygiene issues. The bristles on this brush are not meant for heavy cleaning.

reviews.title: Love these
reviews.text: My kids absolutely love these. The brush their teeth everyday without a fight. I love them they are small perfect for kid hands and super easy to use.

title: Kids Ultrasonic Electric Toothbrush, U Shaped Rechargeable Automatic Toothbrushes with Replacement Brush 6 Cleaning Mode Smart Timer 360° Sonic Dental Care for Ages 2-7 Child (Blue)
features: U-shaped Brush Head: Ninety percent of children aged 2-7 years refuse to brush their teeth. Our upgraded version of the electric toothbrush is designed with a astronaut pattern & U shaped brush head to stimulate children's interest in brushing teeth and develop kids healthy brushing habits. The package comes with a replacement toothbrush, and the u-brush is gentle on the gums and enamel.

6 Automatic Cleaning Modes: Kids electric toothbrushes with up to 5000-20000Hz sonic vibration per minute for comprehensive cleaning of teeth. Can choose from the strong mode for powerful teeth brushing, Comfortable mode, among others. All the different modes are timed to make brushing for kids easy.

IPX7 Waterproof: Toddler electric toothbrush has IPX7 waterproof sealing design, the entire toothbrush can be rinsed with water, it also can be used in the shower. The toothbrush head is removable and replaceable. You can crop as needed.

Rechargeable: Kids toothbrushes equipped with rechargeable battery, USB charging to support brushing for 7-10 days with just 2 hours charging; It is portable and rechargeable, fitting for home or travel use.

45s Smart Timer Control: the 45-second timer control function can educate children to brush their teeth at the recommended time, which can complete tooth cleaning more scientifically. If you have any problems about toothbrush, please contact us by email.

reviews.title: Toddler loves this.
reviews.text: We use this to help brushing teeth during the daytime a breeze, as our 3 year old can do it himself. Then at night, do his teeth ourselves. It's come in very handy!

title: mushie Baby Finger Toothbrush (Tradewinds/Stone) 2-Pack
features: Help brushing go smoothly and begin building good habits with our silicone baby finger toothbrushes.
Designed in Sweden and made of soft, food-grade silicone, they slip onto your fingertip so you can gently clean your baby's teeth without irritating gums.
Hand wash in warm water. Replace every 3-4 months.
Caution: Not a toy. Adult supervision required under 3 years of age. Do not leave a child unattended with this product.

reviews.title: LOVE THESE BABY TOOTHBRUSHES!
reviews.text: I love everything from this brand. Mushie has the best baby silicone products and I wish I had bought the other products from Amazon so that I can write these reviews! I've been skeptical about using the cotton baby toothbrushes because I don't want any lint staying in my baby's mouth or it slipping off and be a potential choking hazard. This silicone toothbrush fits perfectly on my finger and makes it so much easier to brush his teeth rather than using a toothbrush and worrying about scraping the roof of his mouth. It's soft all around and has a silicone brush side to brush and a bumpy side for better gum stimulation. It comes in a pack of two and this brand has various modern colors. I highly recommend this product for infant brushing!

reviews.title: Great Product, easy to use!
reviews.text: My baby girl loved this toothbrush! It made brushing her teeth so easy and she loved it! She had so much fun brushing her teeth!

reviews.title: A little large but overall good
reviews.text: These are a little large for 0-3 months but overall easy use, clean and very soft.

reviews.title: love these

title: Bitvae Smart S3 Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults, 180-Day Battery Life Rechargeable Electric Power Toothbrush with Pressure Sensor, Champagne Gold
features: 【Provides Diamond Cleaning】Bitvae Smart S3 Rechargeable sonic toothbrush features an industry-leading ultrasonic motor that generates 40,000RPM. It provides superior cleaning even in hard-to-reach areas of your mouth. If you are looking for a professional cleaning toothbrush, this is the one!

【Unique Bristle Design to Prevent Tooth Decay】The unique bristle design of the sonic cleaning brush sets it apart from others. Users can get a more thorough dental cleaning experience than with a standard toothbrush. Effectively reduces tartar buildup and helps prevent tooth decay or cavities.

【Personalize Your Brushing】Here are 5 modes & 3 intensities on our sonic toothbrush (9 adjustable intensities on the app) for various gum care needs. This IPX7 waterproof toothbrush has a built-in 2mins timer that pulses every 30secs to remind you to switch to the next quadrant of the mouth.

【180-Day Battery Life】Bitvae S3 long-lasting battery toothbrush for adults features a 4-hour quick-charge battery that lasts up to 180 days, making it perfect for travel and far outperforming other toothbrushes on the market. Say goodbye to the bulky charging base with our USB Type-C cable.

【Pressure sensor protects teeth and gums】 Brushing too hard can damage tooth enamel, increase sensitivity and lead to gum recession. Our electronic toothbrush with pressure indicator will light up RED to remind you to reduce the pressure to protect your teeth and gums.

【"iSpruz" Smart Oral Care App】This Smart Bluetooth Toothbrush is paired with the app to track and store data on brushing time, coverage, uniformity and excess pressure. You can also change various settings through the app (such as brushing modes, intensities, and brushing time).

【Toothbrush Holder & Travel Case Included】The travel-friendly electric toothbrush includes a travel case that allows users to take the toothbrush anywhere. It also includes a toothbrush/phone holder that helps keep your toothbrush clean at all times. Great all round gift for yourself or your family.
【Package Includes】1 Bitvae S3 Toothbrush Handle, 4 Toothbrush Heads, 4 Toothbrush Covers, 1 Travel Case, 1 Toothbrush/Phone Holder, 1 USB Cable (Adaptor not Included), and 1 User Manual.
【1 Year Warranty】If you have any question, please contact bitvae fast and friendly customer service team, we will do our best to sovle any problem.

reviews.title: This toothbrush is amazing!
reviews.text: I was surprised by how well this smart electric toothbrush works. The toothbrush connected via Bluetooth to the iSpruz app without any problems. This is a great tool to improve your brushing skills! My teeth feel amazing after each brush. Great affordable toothbrush. Comes with a nice travel case.

reviews.title: Impressive amount of features and app allows customization and guidance for optimal brushing
reviews.text:
I got this to replace an old electric toothbrush, and I'm blown away at how technology has transformed tooth brushing! There are so many customizable features with this toothbrush, and the app will tell you if you're applying too much pressure, missing areas, or not spending enough time brushing.

Here are some of the pleasant surprises:

> Comes with a really nice travel case
> includes a special super soft brush head for gum massage
> The app is AMAZING. It's quick and easy to download and has lots of information and options to adjust the toothbrush operation
> Instruction pamphlet is well written and covers everything you need to know

HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!

reviews.title: Good value for the money, wish it pulsated a little stronger. Terrible app.
reviews.text: For the money this might be the best budget friendly electric toothbrush on Amazon in my opinion. Stay away from the app. It is terribly designed and doesn't consistently sync. The pulses are stronger than others in the same price class, but it isn't quite strong enough to give my mouth a feeling in deep cleaning.

reviews.title: Five Stars if it suits your needs.
reviews.text:
First of all, the base color was supposed to be black and it is what they call black, but it’s kind of a copper a metallic black not a true black.
The design is compact and it works very well.
I even like the little cord holder that comes with it as it’s very ergonomically designed.
The unit works just fine for my sonicare by Phillips.
I happen to have the one with a glass. After using this a couple of days I realized I like the look of the glass better than I like this.
On the other hand, if you have a very small space in which to put it on your sink, you may prefer something with a smaller silhouette; the footprint is the same, but it’s just not as big a presence because you don’t have the height and width of the glass.

reviews.title: Just as original
reviews.text: I got this to replace mu original charger for electric toothbrush, it looks just like it and so far, it has been working as the original, would recommend.

reviews.title: Great replacement or spare charger for Sonicare
reviews.text:
I really like my Sonic Care toothbrush and take it anywhere. So getting a second charger was a no-brainer.
I chose the gold colored base and it really looks nice.

It works just like the original and comes with the clear plastic holder, but you can also use the glass cup on it if you like. The cable is nice and long and I like that it comes in black, which fits better with some décor. I think there are some choices in regard to color of the base and cable.

Nothing bad to say about them.
perfect for travel or if you have a second home and don't want to constantly take the charger with you; and of course as a replacement.
